title: something different Mystical Crescent Moon & Stars Cut-Out Design Black Ceramic Oil Burner - 10.5cm x 9.5cm (1 Pc.) - Premium Quality Material - Ideal for Aromatherapy, Home Decor Accent & Gift
features: CRESCENT MOON & STARS CUT-OUT DESIGN: This mystical crescent moon & stars cut-out ceramic oil burner showcases an exquisite and captivating celestial design, adding a touch of elegance and mystique to your aromatherapy sessions and home ambiance.

PREMIUM QUALITY MATERIAL: Made from high-quality black ceramic, our oil burner ensures durability, longevity, and heat resistance, ensuring a safe and steady release of relaxing scents throughout your space.

VERSATILE USAGE: Perfect for essential oils, wax melts, simmering granules, or potpourri, this mesmerizing oil burner caters to various aroma preferences; enjoy its calming, uplifting, and therapeutic benefits.

IDEAL HOME DECOR: Measuring 10.5cm x 9.5cm, this enchanting oil burner perfectly complements your home decor, creating a soothing, inviting atmosphere in any room; its soft, ambient glow casts beautiful shadows, enhancing your space's visual appeal.

PERFECT GIFT: Win the hearts of friends and family with this thoughtful and unique gift that appeals to aromatherapy enthusiasts, collectors, and home decor lovers; ideal for housewarmings, birthdays, holidays, or just because.
description: Product Description Thi black ceramic oil burner feature a cutout crecent moon and tar deign with a cool matt finih. Compatible with both fragrance oil and wax and perfect for Halloween or pooky decor! Dimenion H10cm X W9cm X D9cm Weight 302g Directions 1. Remove the oil burner from its packaging. 2. Clean the ceramic dish with warm, soapy water. 3. Fill the dish with water up to the recommended level. 4. Add a few drops of your preferred essential oil to the water. 5. Place a lit tea light candle underneath the dish. 6. Ensure the tea light is on a heat-resistant surface and away from flammable materials. 7. Let the water and oil mixture heat up, which will release the essential oil's fragrance into the room. Safety Warning Always use this product on a heat-resistant surface and away from flammable materials. Never leave the lit candle unattended. Keep out of reach of children and pets. Avoid direct skin contact with undiluted essential oils. Use essential oils with caution and discontinue use if irritation occurs. Ensure proper ventilation during use. See more
